title: Launch fast, stay simple.
subtitle: A one-file landing example showing the absolute minimum needed to ship a server-rendered marketing page.

features.title: Single binary
features.description: Compile, drop on a server, done. No runtime dependencies.

features.title: Server-rendered
features.description: Templ + Tailwind 4 give you instant first paint with no client JS overhead.

features.title: UI8Kit shell
features.description: Header, theme switch, and consistent design tokens out of the box.
